creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 184322
poudriere log file

Poudriere log file is attached, and result of portlint is as following:

/usr/ports/mail/py3-authres

FATAL: Makefile: extra item "MASTERDIR" placed in the PORTNAME section.

2 fatal errors and 0 warnings found.
